name: ?? Medical Edition Issue

---

**Clinical Context**
Describe the medical/clinical scenario where this issue occurs or feature is needed.

**IMSS/UMF Specific (if applicable)**
- UMF Number: [e.g., UMF 11 Delicias]
- Department: [e.g., Family Medicine, Pediatrics]
- Protocol: [e.g., PAI HTA, PAI DM2]

**Issue/Feature Details**
Detailed description of the issue or requested feature.

**Patient Privacy**
- [ ] I confirm no patient identifying information is included
- [ ] Data shown is anonymized/demo data only

**Priority Level**
- [ ] Critical (affects patient care)
- [ ] High (affects clinical workflow)
- [ ] Medium (improvement to existing feature)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

**Additional Notes**
Any other relevant information.
